entries.title: Knots and Links
entries.venue: Publish or Perish; reprinted AMS Chelsea 2003
entries.note: Classical reference; source of the Rolfsen knot table used in the Knot Explorer.

entries.title: An Introduction to Knot Theory
entries.note: Standard modern textbook: Seifert surfaces, Alexander and Jones polynomials, Temperley-Lieb algebra, quantum invariants.

entries.title: Knots and Physics
entries.note: Bracket polynomial, state-sum models, Yang-Baxter, statistical-mechanics links.

entries.title: A Survey of Knot Theory
entries.note: Broad survey; extensive coverage of Alexander module, signatures, concordance.

entries.title: Knot Theory and its Applications
entries.note: Accessible introduction; worked examples for Seifert's algorithm and polynomial computations.

entries.authors: Ozsvath, P.; Stipsicz, A.; Szabo, Z.
entries.title: Grid Homology for Knots and Links
entries.note: Combinatorial approach to knot Floer homology via grid diagrams.

entries.title: On the Vassiliev knot invariants
entries.note: Foundational finite-type / Vassiliev invariants reference.

entries.title: A categorification of the Jones polynomial
entries.note: The original Khovanov homology paper.

entries.title: Holomorphic disks and knot invariants
entries.note: Original definition of knot Floer homology.

entries.title: A polynomial invariant for knots via von Neumann algebras
entries.note: The Jones polynomial announcement.

entries.title: Topological invariants of knots and links
entries.note: Original Alexander polynomial paper.

entries.title: Ueber das Geschlecht von Knoten
entries.note: Introduces Seifert surfaces and the algorithm for constructing them.

entries.title: A lemma on systems of knotted curves
entries.note: Alexander's theorem: every tame link is the closure of a braid.

entries.title: Ueber die freie Aequivalenz der geschlossenen Zoepfe
entries.note: Markov's theorem: braid closures representing the same link are related by conjugation and stabilization.

entries.title: Elementare Begruendung der Knotentheorie
entries.note: The three Reidemeister moves; combinatorial knot theory.

entries.title: State models and the Jones polynomial
entries.note: Introduces the Kauffman bracket and derives the Jones polynomial from it.

entries.title: An invariant of regular isotopy
entries.note: The Kauffman polynomial F.

entries.authors: Freyd, P.; Yetter, D.; Hoste, J.; Lickorish, W. B. R.; Millett, K.; Ocneanu, A.
entries.title: A new polynomial invariant of knots and links
entries.note: HOMFLY polynomial; independent (almost-simultaneous) discovery with Przytycki-Traczyk gives HOMFLY-PT.

entries.title: Invariants of links of Conway type
entries.note: The 'PT' in HOMFLY-PT.

entries.title: Virtual knot theory
entries.note: Definition and theory of virtual knots.

entries.title: Quantum field theory and the Jones polynomial
entries.note: Chern-Simons TQFT interpretation of Jones; sl_N generalizations via Wilson loops.

entries.title: Topological quantum field theories
entries.note: Axiomatization of TQFT.

entries.title: Invariants of 3-manifolds via link polynomials and quantum groups
entries.note: RT construction: ribbon categories of quantum group modules give link and 3-manifold invariants.

entries.title: Vassiliev's knot invariants
entries.note: The Kontsevich integral: universal finite-type invariant.

entries.authors: Kronheimer, P. B.; Mrowka, T. S.
entries.title: Gauge theory for embedded surfaces I
entries.note: Proof of the Milnor conjecture g_4(T_{p,q}) = (p-1)(q-1)/2; genesis of smooth 4-manifold invariants applied to knots.

entries.authors: Kronheimer, P. B.; Mrowka, T. S.
entries.title: Khovanov homology is an unknot-detector
entries.note: Khovanov homology detects the unknot via a spectral sequence to instanton Floer homology.

entries.title: Khovanov homology and the slice genus
entries.note: The Rasmussen s-invariant; combinatorial reproof of the Milnor conjecture.

entries.title: Knots are determined by their complements
entries.note: Gordon-Luecke theorem.

entries.title: On Dehn's lemma and the asphericity of knots
entries.note: Proof of Dehn's lemma; knot complements are aspherical.

entries.title: Homology of group systems with applications to knot theory
entries.note: Symmetrized Seifert form; definition of the knot signature.

entries.title: Ueber eine numerische Knoteninvariante
entries.note: Bridge number and additivity under connected sum.

entries.title: Knoten mit zwei Brücken
entries.note: Classification of 2-bridge (rational) knots.

entries.title: Knots and Primes: An Introduction to Arithmetic Topology
entries.note: Definitive modern reference for Morishita's dictionary (knots ↔ primes).

entries.title: Untersuchungen ueber quadratische Formen in Koerpern der Charakteristik 2
entries.note: Original Arf invariant paper for quadratic forms over F_2.

entries.title: An invariant of knot cobordism
entries.note: Arf invariant applied to knots; shown to be a concordance invariant.

entries.title: A manifold which does not admit any differentiable structure
entries.note: Kervaire invariant for framed (4k+2)-manifolds.

entries.authors: Hill, M. A.; Hopkins, M. J.; Ravenel, D. C.
entries.title: On the nonexistence of elements of Kervaire invariant one
entries.note: Resolution of the Kervaire invariant problem for j >= 7; leaves dimension 126 as the only open case.

entries.title: On knots I, II, III
entries.note: First systematic knot tabulation; the Tait conjectures.

entries.title: Jones polynomials and classical conjectures in knot theory
entries.note: Murasugi's contribution to the proof of Tait conjectures via the Jones polynomial.

entries.title: A spanning tree expansion of the Jones polynomial
entries.note: Thistlethwaite's contribution to the Tait conjectures.

entries.title: The classification of alternating links
entries.note: Proof of the Tait flyping conjecture.

entries.title: Matrix factorizations and link homology
entries.note: sl(N) Khovanov-Rozansky homology via matrix factorizations.

entries.title: An endomorphism of the Khovanov invariant
entries.note: Lee deformation and the spectral sequence converging to Rasmussen's s-invariant.

entries.title: On Gamma-extensions of algebraic number fields
entries.note: Iwasawa modules and the Iwasawa polynomial; arithmetic analogue of Alexander module.

entries.title: Remarks on the Alexander polynomial
entries.note: Origin of the Alexander-Iwasawa analogy that seeded arithmetic topology.

entries.title: A calculus for framed links in S^3
entries.note: Kirby calculus: handle slides and stabilization on framed links.

entries.title: A unified Witten-Reshetikhin-Turaev invariant for integral homology spheres
entries.note: Cyclotomic expansion of colored Jones; unified WRT invariant.
